name: Kelsey Law Firm, PLLC

attorneys.name: John E. Kelsey
attorneys.role: Attorney (solo practitioner; firm led by him per firm site)

websiteQuality.rationale: The site is a modern Wix build served over HTTPS with a viewport meta tag, a keyword-rich title and meta description, clear navigation (Home/About/Attorney/Practice areas/Blog/Contact), a multi-field intake form, client testimonials, and a 'Since 1995 / 30+ years' trust signal. However, it is very heavy (~1.9 MB of HTML with ~80 script tags), phone numbers are plain text with no tel: click-to-call links, there is no online appointment-booking widget, and social links still point to a former brand name (Kelsey Kelsey Hickey PLLC). Solid and usable, but not polished enough to be Strong.

factors.mobileUsability: Responsive Wix template with <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">; mobile layouts are standard for this platform.
factors.pageSpeed: Not directly measured (no lab tooling available). Inference from observable signals: homepage HTML alone is ~1.9 MB with roughly 80 <script> tags (typical Wix bloat), so load performance is likely mediocre, especially on mobile connections.
factors.accessibility: All 20 observed tags carry alt attributes; 100+ aria-label attributes and semantic header/nav/main/footer landmarks are present via the Wix framework.
factors.visualCredibility: Clean, current design with professional logo, team photos, and client testimonials; footer copyright reads 2025. Social icons link partly to a defunct predecessor brand, which slightly undercuts polish.
factors.navigation: Clear top navigation covering practice areas, about, attorney bio, blog, and contact; practice-area cards on the homepage link to detail pages.
factors.contentClarity: Plain-language explanations of each practice area (estate planning, elder law, real estate, business law, mediation/arbitration, guardianships) plus an active blog with educational posts.
factors.callsToAction: Repeated 'Contact Us' / 'Schedule Your Initial Consultation' prompts and phone number in hero and about pages; CTAs are present but phone is not hyperlinked for tap-to-call.
factors.contactFormQuality: Multi-field intake form (name, email, phone, state/zip, 'Brief Description of Your Legal Issue') on homepage and contact page; labeled fields. No email address is published anywhere on the site.
factors.localPositioning: Strong local framing: 'Denton Texas Lawyers' title, 'Hometown Attorney' section citing firm roots in Denton County since the 1960s, historic-home office story, and Denton address/phone displayed prominently.
factors.trustSignals: Homepage testimonials (three 5/5 reviews), 'Since 1995 / 30+ years of experience' banner, detailed attorney bio (bar admission 1995, education, Denton County Bar Association roles), and online payment links on the contact page.
factors.appointmentBooking: No self-serve scheduling/booking widget found; booking-related strings in the HTML are internal Wix framework code only. Intake is via contact form or phone call.

sources.supports: Official firm name, practice areas (estate planning, elder law, real estate, business law, mediation & arbitration, guardianships, probate/trust/guardianship law), '30+ years of experience / Since 1995', claim that firm dates to 1960s in Denton County, team roster (John E. Kelsey, attorney; Victoria McKenzie, R.P., paralegal), testimonials, website-quality signals (viewport meta, meta description, script/image counts, form fields, footer year, social links)
'Since 1995' establishment claim, father Richard H. Kelsey began practicing in Denton in 1967 and John joined him in 1995, consultation CTA and phone 940-387-9551
Street address 2225 E. McKinney Street, Denton, TX 76209; mailing address P.O. Box 918, Denton, TX 76202-0918; phone 940-387-9551; fax 940-387-9553; online payment links; footer copyright 2025

Attorney bio: licensed by State Bar of Texas in May 1995 (yearBeganPractice 1995), B.A. economics UNT 1992, J.D. Texas Wesleyan 1994, practiced with father Richard H. Kelsey, bar admissions (Texas 1995; E.D. Tex.), areas of practice, DCBA Real Estate/Probate/Trust section leadership, guardianship certifications
Directory corroboration of attorney full name (John Eliot Kelsey), Denton location, and phone (940) 387-9551 via search snippet; page itself returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch
Directory corroboration of John E. Kelsey as Denton elder law/guardianship attorney with phone 940-387-9551 via search snippet; page itself returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch

unverified: public business email (none published on firm site; directories that might list one blocked automated fetch with 403)
exact legal formation year of the PLLC entity (site's 'Since 1995' refers to start of John E. Kelsey's practice with his father, not necessarily PLLC registration)
claim that the practice 'dates back to the 1960s in Denton County' (firm's own marketing statement; only specific anchor is father's 1967 Denton practice start, also from the firm site)
notable reported cases, verdicts, or settlements (none found in public news or court coverage)
ratings/reviews on Avvo, Super Lawyers, or Martindale-Hubbell (no verifiable profiles or ratings located)
notes: Site and social profiles reference a former brand, 'Kelsey & Hickey, PLLC' / 'Kelsey Kelsey Hickey PLLC' (Facebook/Twitter handles still use KKHLawTX), indicating a prior partnership that has since become a solo practice under Kelsey Law Firm, PLLC. Attorney page title also retains 'Kelsey & Hickey, PLLC'. Firm operates from a restored historic home in Denton. Justia snippet miscategorizes practice areas (mentions bankruptcy/employment) and appears stale; firm-site practice areas were used instead.
